gaps.description: Process 'amrfinder' uses a container image with a latest tag ('staphb/ncbi-amrfinderplus:latest'). This is not reproducible — the same tag can point to a different image over time.
gaps.recommendation:
Pin to a specific version tag or SHA digest, e.g.:
    container 'quay.io/biocontainers/tool:1.0.0'
    container 'quay.io/biocontainers/tool@sha256:abc123'

Pin to a specific version tag or SHA digest, e.g.:

gaps.description: Process 'blastn' contains hardcoded absolute paths in its script block. These paths will not exist on cloud execution environments.
gaps.recommendation: Replace hardcoded paths with Nextflow input parameters. Reference files should be declared in the input: block and passed in via a params file or the workflow's input channel.

gaps.description: Process 'circos' has no container directive. It cannot run portably on any WES-compliant cloud platform.
gaps.recommendation:
Add a container directive with a pinned image, e.g.:
    container 'quay.io/biocontainers/tool:1.0.0'
